title: Nugget Is Dead: A Christmas Story
original_title: Nugget Is Dead?: A Christmas Story
overview: When her beloved family dog Nugget falls sick over Christmas, a city dermatologist must return home to confront both her dysfunctional family, and the mortality of the one family member that brings them all together.
